---
name: Project brief
about: Frame a project before building it
title: "Project: <name>"
labels: ["project"]
---

## The problem
- Who is the user / what problem?
- How is it solved today?

## Why AI + approach
- Why an LLM/ML fit? Simplest version that works?
- Design (RAG / agent / prompt / classifier) and model/tools + why.

## Success metric
- What does "good" look like and how will I measure it (eval method, baseline)?

## Risks
- Failure modes + mitigation/detection.

## Scope
- In scope (v1):
- Out of scope:
